title: Cayratia ruspolii
taxonomy: Cayratia ruspolii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Vitaceae. The genus Cayratia is a part of the Vitaceae family, which also includes other plants like grapes and kiwifruit. Cayratia ruspolii is a species endemic to Madagascar, and it is closely related to other species within the Vitaceae family. The classification of Cayratia ruspolii is based on its morphological characteristics and phylogenetic analysis. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification of this species.
